description_long: This is a modern, upright refrigerator with a sleek metallic silver finish and a two-door design, featuring a freezer compartment on top and a larger refrigerator section below. The front door displays a small digital control panel and three colorful sticky notes, adding a touch of everyday realism. The handles are long, vertical, and black, running along the left edge of each door, providing easy access. The sides and back are plain, with a matte gray texture that contrasts with the shinier front. No visible vents, grilles, or brand logos are present on the exterior. The overall design is minimalistic and functional, suitable for placement in urban environments such as garages, sidewalks, or outdoor kitchens.
description: A tall, silver, two-door refrigerator with a digital display and sticky notes on the front, featuring long black handles and a minimalist design.
description_view_0: Front view showing both doors, black handles, a digital control panel, and three sticky notes.
description_view_1: Left side view displaying a plain, matte gray surface with no visible features.
description_view_2: Rear view showing a completely flat, featureless gray back panel.
description_view_3: Right side view with a plain gray surface and a slight profile of the protruding handles.
attribute_door_handle_style: Long, vertical, black handles protruding from the left edge of each door.
